programme.title: Crvena zvezda vs Celtic - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - MD1
programme.desc: Crvena Zvezda have met Celtic twice before in major European competition, losing a last 16 tie 6-2 on aggregate in the European Cup in 1968-69. Celtic have lost two of their six European meetings with Serbian sides previously, failing to win any of their three away matches during that time.

programme.title: San Antonio vs New York - NBA Season 2025 - 2026 - Finals 5
programme.desc: Live and Exclusive coverage on beIN of The National Basketball Association, The NBA comprises of 30 teams and is one of the major professional sports leagues in the United States and Canada and is the premier professional basketball league in the world.

programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) - Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking. All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
programme.desc: Live and exclusive only on beIN, the Coupe de France, also referred to as the French Cup, is the premier knockout cup competition in French football organised by the French Football Federation (FF). The winner qualifies for the group stage of the UEFA Europa League and a place in the Trophée des Champions. Current champions are Paris saint Germain.

programme.desc: This will be the fourth meeting between USA and Bosnia and Herzegovina, with the Stars and Stripes unbeaten in the first three, all in friendlies from 2013 to 2021. USA have won just one of their last 21 FIFA World Cup meetings with UEFA nations, and are winless in their last 13 since a 3-2 victory over Portugal in 2002.

programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Belgium and Senegal in any competition. None of those previous six matches happened in the knockout stages of the competition.
